title: Vegan Cream Cheese
instructions:
1. Place the nuts in a large bowl and cover with plenty of boiling water. Set aside for at least half an hour to soak then drain well.
2. Place the drained nuts in a blender or food processor along with the lemon juice, olive oil, water, salt, garlic and nutritional yeast.
3. Blend at a high speed until very smooth and creamy. Scrape down the sides as needed to make sure that there are no lumps left. If you need to you can add a drop more water or oil to adjust texture.
4. Scrape the cheese into a bowl and cover. It is ready to eat right away but will firm up in the fridge and the flavours will mellow so I recommend refrigerating it overnight before eating.
5. Store in an airtight container in the fridge for up to a week.

variations.name: Garlic and Herb
variations.description: Add extra garlic and parsley, basil, oregano, etc.

variations.name: Lemon Mint
variations.description: Add lemon juice and zest and fresh mint.

variations.name: Cinnamon
variations.description: Omit all garlic and nutritional yeast. Add cinnamon and warming spices.
